package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for handler_switches_on_error_strings: Handlers that branch on `err.Error()` text rather than typed errors.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: warning.
type Rule073NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule073NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule073NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario073Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule073NegativeService, input Rule073NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
